title: Eon
description: Carefully constructed compilation creation containing cool changes.
body:
# What is this modpack?
Eon is designed to be a kitchen sink modpack, aimed at not taking up the power of your entire PC. We’ve included hundreds of specially-curated mods, specially curated by UnperishedFoods and Professorlouie2 for the best possible experience. Play with friends, create new structures, and explore a world like you’ve never seen it before.

**We are currently in beta and support Neoforge 1.20.1. If there’s an update, check the versions tab!**
# What are the main features?
Eon contains many mods with a lot of them like Ars nouveau and Iron spells and spell books being used to add magic to the game with other mods like Mekanism and Create to bring technology for you to experiment with. Eon also contains weapons for you to play with such as guns and many popular hero's weapons through Palladium, Fsang18’s Hero Pack, and an unofficial port of MrCrayfish's Gun Mod. Eon also features MCA Reborn to make the game feel more alive where you can talk to villagers instead of just being able to talk with them. Eon also has more enemies for you to gear up against such as dragons in Ice and Fire, which you can even have as a pet once you find a dragon's egg.

# Our Sponsor
[![This image is of our partner Kinetic Hosting who offers 15% off your first month using the code ZEPHYR](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8532c65a47afd8deb783e9779ac34878f116834_0.webp)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=833)
*Turn off your adblocker!*


# Copyright info
You’re free to use this modpack under the terms of the *CC-BY-NC-SA 4.0* license. If you have any questions, contact us at unperishedfoods@gmail.com

# FAQs
### Why is this modpack not on CurseForge?
We attempted to upload to CurseForge but due to terrible moderation (rejection of our NeoForge modpack due to inclusion of Forge mods that are proven to work across devices on NeoForge, as intended), we chose to go with Modrinth instead. 

For the best experience, please use the Modrinth app, ATLauncher, or MultiMC/Prism!

### What happened to the Eclipse modpack?
This was a project that we felt had potential but we couldn’t get off of the ground due to lack of motivation and difficulties with optimization/Forge resource management. This could be considered as a sequel if you prefer. You can still find the latest version of Eclipse on CurseForge, located [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/eclipse-new-horizons). 

### Will there be a server version?
Likely soon, if we can still access a server.
### What will happen in the future?
In the future to make the modpack truly unique we will strive to add fully custom kubejs and even a custom mod to uplift your experience even more so you can have a fun time playing solo or not.

### How much RAM should I allocate?
We recommend anywhere from 4 GB to 8 GB, preferably.

# Related Projects
- Music Redefined
- Complementary Shaders
- Embeddium
- Lootr
- Iron Spells N’ Spellbooks
- Ice & Fire
- Ars Nouveau
- Mekanism
- Guns
- Palladium
- Fsang18’s Hero Pack
- Create
- MCA Reborn
- And many more!!

*We are currently in beta. Let us know if there are any bugs!*
*This modpack is not affiliated with any SMPs or other servers. You may use it freely and have fun with your friends!*
